steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize calcite's Mohs scale number (3). The correct answer must make that specific number the primary focus of the sentence.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Calcite has a Mohs scale number of 3': leads with the number directly and immediately explains what it means, making 3 the central fact. ✓
  • Choice B: buries the number or frames calcite primarily in terms of another property, so the Mohs number is not the main emphasis. ✗
  • Choice C: mentions calcite in a context where the Mohs number is secondary to another point. ✗
  • Choice D: similarly fails to foreground the specific Mohs scale number of 3 as the primary claim. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
